definitions.def: Unfavorable; negative; not good.

definitions.def: Something or someone that is the worst
To make worse.
Something that would happen, or would be the case, under different circumstances; a potentiality.
A person who writes, or produces literary work.

definitions.def: Graphism of symbols such as letters that express some meaning.

definitions.def: To form letters, words or symbols on a surface in order to communicate.

definitions.def: A small, usually uncultivated area adjoining or (now especially) within the precincts of a house or other building.

definitions.def: A solar year, the time it takes the Earth to complete one revolution of the Sun (between 365.24 and 365.26 days depending on the point of reference).
definitions.example: we moved to this town a year ago;  I quit smoking exactly one year ago

definitions.def: The day immediately before today; one day ago.
definitions.example: Today is the child of yesterday and the parent of tomorrow.

definitions.def: On the day before today.
definitions.example: I started to watch the video yesterday, but could only finish it this evening.

definitions.def: People who are young; young people, collectively; youth.
definitions.example: The young of today are well-educated.

definitions.def: To become or seem to become younger.
In the early part of growth or life; born not long ago.
definitions.example: a lamb is a young sheep;  these picture books are for young readers

definitions.def: That which belongs to you (singular); the possessive second-person singular pronoun used without a following noun.
definitions.example: If this edit is mine, the other must be yours.  Their encyclopedia is good, but yours is even better.  It’s all yours.

definitions.def: (reflexive pronoun) Your own self (singular).
definitions.example: Be careful with that fire or you'll burn yourself.

definitions.def: The numeric symbol that represents the cardinal number zero.
definitions.example: In unary and k-adic notation in general, zero is the empty string.

definitions.def: To set a measuring instrument to zero; to calibrate instrument scale to valid zero.
definitions.example: Zero the fluorometer with the same solvent used in extraction.

definitions.def: No, not any
definitions.example: She showed zero respect.

definitions.def: To declare to be a fact.
definitions.example: He stated that he was willing to help.

definitions.def: Statement
(heading) To position or be positioned physically.
Erect, not cut down.

definitions.def: Position or reputation in society or a profession.
definitions.example: He does not have much of a standing as a chemist.

definitions.def: (grammar) A demonstrative word
That serves to demonstrate, show or prove

(grammar) A type of noun that refers anaphorically to another noun or noun phrase, but which cannot ordinarily be preceded by a determiner and rarely takes an attributive adjective. English examples include I, you, him, who, me, my, each other.
To recognize someone or something as different from others based on its characteristics.
definitions.example: The soldier distinguished himself in combat and received a medal.

definitions.def: The act by which something is distinguished or told apart.
That serves to distinguish.
(grammar) The plural number.
Consisting of or containing more than one of something.
A large cup for hot liquids, usually having a handle and used without a saucer.
definitions.example: What an ugly mug.

definitions.def: To strike in the face.
definitions.example: The children weren't interested in sitting still for a serious photo; they mugged for the camera.

definitions.def: Easily fooled, gullible.
The science of the design of equipment, especially so as to reduce operator fatigue, discomfort and injury.
